name: Corn (food medium)
description: Food-derived medium: metabolizable components of Corn (Zea mays) [Cereals and cereal products] from FooDB, plus a standard M9 mineral base. Organic components use presence-based uptake bounds; FooDB content retained. Measured compounds with no BiGG exchange are listed under uncovered.

provenance.citation: FooDB v2020-04-07 (Wishart DS et al., foodb.ca). Content sources: DTU, DUKE, PHENOL EXPLORER, Ron G. Buttery and Louisa C. Ling. Volatile Flavor Components of Com Tortillas and Related Products. J. Agrie. Food Chem. 1995, 43, 1878-1882, Ron G. Buttery, Donald J. Stern, and Louisa C. Ling. Studies on Flavor Volatiles of Some Sweet Corn Products. J. Agrie. Food Chem. 1994, 42, 791-795, USDA.
provenance.notes: Organic components mapped from FooDB compounds to BiGG via InChIKey/name. Mineral base added. Bounds presence-based; foodb_content retained. Unmapped measured compounds kept in uncovered (v2 completeness fix).
